text: Now I know the shape. PRs have a `closes_linear` field linking to a Linear issue ID. Let me fetch merged PRs and all Linear issues, then join.

tool_calls.name: execute_lisp
tool_calls.input:
{"code":"

(def linear-issues (linear__list_issues {}))

;; Build a lookup from Linear issue id -> state

;; Filter merged PRs that reference a Linear issue whose state is NOT 'done'
